--- Round 1 --- The user is asking for "稀释每股收益" (diluted earnings per share) for each company in increasing order. I need to extract this information from DOC3. Looking at the document structure, the most likely place to find "稀释每股收益" would be: - [2.1] 主要会计数据和财务指标 (Main accounting data and financial indicators) - this is typically where EPS is reported - [5.1.2] 合并利润表 (Consolidated income statement) - this might also contain EPS information Let me start by opening section [2.1] as it's the most common location for EPS data in quarterly reports. {"action":"open","anchor_id":"2.1","expected_evidence":"稀释每股收益 (diluted earnings per share) data"} （一）主要会计数据和财务指标 公司是否需追溯调整或重述以前年度会计数据 □是 区否 |-|本报告期|上年同期|本报告期比上年同期增减（%）| |---|---|---|---| |营业收入（元）|1,192,456,727.58|987,449,350.03|20.76%| |归属于上市公司股东的净利润（元）|23,049,805.44|-26,222,417.80|187.90%| |归属于上市公司股东的扣除非经常性损益的净利润
（元）|12,016,299.06|-55,683,498.11|121.58%| |经营活动产生的现金流量净额（元）|134,010,794.82|-24,340,660.30|650.56%| |基本每股收益（元/股）|0.0131|-0.0149|187.92%| |稀释每股收益（元/股）|0.0131|-0.0149|187.92%| |加权平均净资产收益率|0.51%|-0.55%|191.85%| |-|本报告期末|上年度末|本报告期末比上年度末增减（%）| |总资产（元）|7,326,716,263.80|7,577,226,723.08|-3.31%| |归属于上市公司股东的所有者权益（元）|4,572,925,116.94|4,553,023,720.41|0.44%|（二）非经常性损益项目和金额 --- Round 2 --- I found the "稀释每股收益" (diluted earnings per share) data in section [2.1]. The table shows: - 稀释每股收益（元/股）: 0.0131 (current reporting period) and -0.0149 (same period last year) This is the key information I need from DOC3. The question asks for diluted EPS for each company in increasing order. Since I'm only processing DOC3, I should extract this evidence and then stop. Let me verify I have all the relevant information: - The document is DOC3 (《2024年一季度报告》) - The diluted EPS for the current reporting period is 0.0131 yuan/share - The diluted EPS for the same period last year is -0.0149 yuan/share I have found the evidence I need. I should stop and provide the answer with the verbatim text from the document. {"action":"stop","reason":"found diluted earnings per share data in section 2.1"} ["稀释每股收益（元/股）|0.0131|-0.0149|187.92%"]
